description: Release granted by the wife of Abū l-Makārim al-Kātib to Abū l-Ḥasan, whom she releases from all obligations after having received from him three deeds of a house in the Mamsusa quarter inherited by her father. Signed by Sason b. Mevorakh and Mevorakh b. Natan. The qiyyum is not signed. Dated to the mid 12th century. (Information from Goitein's index cards)
description_he: שטר שחרור שנתנה אשת אבו אל-מכארם אל-כאתב. האישה מוותרת על תביעותיה כלפי בעלה.
